ground_truth.title: Packages | Employers Advantage LLC. | Human Resources Solutions
ground_truth.main_content:
Employers Advantage provides a suite of Small Business HR Packages to fit a variety of budgets and needs. Our HR Packages are designed to combine some of our most requested services and provide optional long term support. Custom HR packages and à la carte HR Services are available upon request. If you don't see what you need, contact us, and we'll help you find a solution that fits your small business.

Remote Workforce HR Package: Virtual HR support for remote teams. We are a remote workforce too, so we understand how it works. Whether your workforce is fully remote or flexible with a mix of remote and workplace employees, HR support is different for remote teams. We'll manage the full scope of your HR function and implement processes related to recruiting, onboarding, performance management, employee engagement, operating standards, compliance (including multi-state) and separation of employment specifically for a remote environment.

Small Business HR Department: We truly become your Human Resources Department. We tailor and enact practical and effective HR solutions for you and your team - everything from onboarding to offboarding. Key features include Full Scope HR Audit, Establish Compliance, HR Best Practices, Employee Handbook, Job Descriptions, HR Systems, Performance Management & Employee Relations, Recruiting Management, Onboarding, Offboarding, and HR Administration.

HR Document Starter Package: Your basics are covered with the most common HR documents. This package will effectively equip you to limit liability by having the right paperwork in place. Includes Pre-Employment/Hiring Documents (Employment Application, Reference Check Form, Sample Interview Questions, Sample Offer Letter), New Hire & Employee Documents (New Employee Checklist, Company Property Agreement, Direct Deposit, Emergency Contacts, I-9, W-4), Employee Management Documents (General Employee Handbook, Corrective Action Form, Job Description Template, PTO Request Form, Performance Evaluation Form), and Termination Documents (Confirmation of Resignation, Separation Checklist).

HR on Call: With HR on Call, we are here for you. The expected and unexpected can happen at any time. With affordable monthly plans, we offer practical, effective, and affordable HR advice. You get a dedicated HR point of contact, peace of mind for liability limits, response within 24 hours M-F, phone/email/text response, annual handbook review, and updates on employment regulations.

Complete HR Compliance Package: Includes a Full Scope HR Audit and 1 full year of HR on Call. Our team of HR compliance experts will perform the audit, supply a comprehensive report with recommendations, and provide continued advice. HR Compliance issues can cost a company a lot of cash - it's relatively inexpensive to get your business into HR compliance, as opposed to the consequences of not addressing compliance issues.

Custom HR Support: Every small business is different and so are their HR needs. We will work with you to create an HR support package that outsources only the portions of the HR function that you want help with. Regardless of how little or much HR support you may need, we can design a package to support your needs.
